join_order.notes: n_nationkey in [0,24]; build nation_name[25] direct array; also build nation_dict from n_name_dict.txt
s_suppkey in [1,100000]; build suppkey_to_nationidx[100001] dense direct array indexed by s_suppkey; zero-copy via supplier_pk_hash mmap (2MB, L2-resident); madvise WILLNEED at startup

P32: p_partkey in [1,2000000]; bitmap = 250KB, L2-resident; P35: scan p_name_dict.txt via mmap+memmem() for 'green'; set part_bitmap[p_partkey] for qualifying rows; ~5.4% selectivity -> ~3.24M lineitem rows pass

P11: partsupp_pk_hash composite index (192MB); composite key (l_partkey, l_suppkey); hash = (uint64_t(pk)<<32|sk)*11400714819323198485ull>>32 & mask; retrieve ps_supplycost; C24: bounded probe loop; concurrent madvise with orders index (P27)

P11: orders_pk_hash index (256MB); hash = (uint32_t)l_orderkey*2654435761u & mask; retrieve o_orderdate; C1/C11: gendb::extract_year(o_orderdate) for GROUP BY o_year; C24: bounded probe loop; concurrent madvise with partsupp index (P27)

filters.notes: P35: mmap p_name_dict.txt as raw bytes, scan with memmem() for 'green', collect qualifying int32_t codes; then scan p_name.bin to set part_bitmap[p_partkey]; C2: NEVER hardcode codes
P32: O(1) bitmap test on L2-resident 250KB bitset; applied as FIRST filter in lineitem scan loop to skip hash probes for ~94.6% of rows

data_structures.nation_array: direct_array[25] -> n_name string (from n_name_dict.txt via int16_t code)
data_structures.suppkey_to_nationidx: direct_array[100001] int32_t -> nation_idx; dense suppkey [1,100000]; populated by scanning supplier columns with supplier_pk_hash for row lookup
data_structures.part_bitmap: bitset(2000001) = 250KB; L2-resident; set bit for each qualifying p_partkey; P32 semi-join via single bit test
data_structures.supplier_pk_hash: pre_built_mmap: supplier/indexes/supplier_pk_hash.bin; cap=262144 (2^18); PKSlot{int32_t key, uint32_t row_idx}; hash=(uint32_t)key*2654435761u&mask; 2MB fits L2; madvise WILLNEED at startup
data_structures.partsupp_pk_hash: pre_built_mmap: partsupp/indexes/partsupp_pk_hash.bin; cap=16777216 (2^24); PSSlot{int32_t partkey, int32_t suppkey, uint32_t row_idx}; composite hash via 11400714819323198485ull; 192MB; concurrent madvise P27
data_structures.orders_pk_hash: pre_built_mmap: orders/indexes/orders_pk_hash.bin; cap=33554432 (2^25); PKSlot{int32_t key, uint32_t row_idx}; hash=(uint32_t)key*2654435761u&mask; 256MB; concurrent madvise P27
data_structures.aggregation: direct_2d_array ProfitSlot agg[25][10]; nation_idx=n_nationkey (0-24); year_idx=o_year-BASE_YEAR; 175 max groups; long double sum_profit per C35; thread-local copies, merge after parallel scan

parallelism.lineitem_morsels: chunk lineitem rows into ~64K-row morsels across 64 threads
parallelism.thread_local_agg: each thread owns ProfitSlot local_agg[25][10]; accumulate locally; merge with single-threaded reduction after scan (P17/P20; 175 groups x 64 threads = 11200 slots total - trivial merge)
parallelism.index_sharing: all pre-built mmap indexes read-only shared (no contention)

indexes.madvise: concurrent MADV_WILLNEED via omp parallel sections (P27)

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: l_orderkey -> o_orderdate row; extract year; 256MB
indexes.madvise: concurrent MADV_WILLNEED via omp parallel sections (P27)

correctness_rules.C1_C11: gendb::init_date_tables() once at top of main(); use gendb::extract_year(o_orderdate[orow]) for EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o_orderdate)
correctness_rules.C2: load p_name_dict.txt and n_name_dict.txt at runtime; NEVER hardcode codes
correctness_rules.C15: GROUP BY key includes BOTH nation_idx AND o_year; agg[nation_idx][year_idx] encodes both dimensions
correctness_rules.C18: output nation as nation_dict[code].c_str() string, NOT raw int16_t
correctness_rules.C20: use std::fill() to initialize agg arrays; NEVER memset for non-zero sentinels
correctness_rules.C24: ALL hash table probes use bounded for-loop: for(uint32_t pr=0; pr<cap; pr++)
correctness_rules.C31: double-quote nation string in CSV output: printf("\"%s\"", nation_name.c_str())
correctness_rules.C35: amount = (long double)ep*(1.0L-disc) - (long double)ps_sc*qty; accumulate as long double; C29 int64_t cents does NOT apply to multi-column derived expressions

amount_expression.cpp: long double amount = (long double)ep*(1.0L - disc) - (long double)ps_sc*qty;
amount_expression.accumulation: long double; C35 mandates long double for multi-column derived expressions

aggregation_layout.year_axis: o_year - BASE_YEAR (e.g. 1992) as second index; 10 slots for safety
aggregation_layout.merge: single-pass sum over 64 thread-local arrays (64 * 250 slots = 16000 long doubles = trivial)

data_loading_strategy.phase1_concurrent_madvise: omp parallel sections: madvise partsupp_pk_hash(192MB) + orders_pk_hash(256MB) simultaneously (P27)
data_loading_strategy.phase2_sequential: madvise supplier_pk_hash(2MB, fast); load nation arrays; load supplier suppkey->nationidx
data_loading_strategy.phase3_part_filter: P35: mmap p_name_dict.txt raw + memmem('green') scan; build part_bitmap[2M] in single pass over p_name.bin
data_loading_strategy.static_mmap_caching: P36: use static column pointers to avoid re-mmap on hot runs
